name.en: Medicurius the Power Patron of Illusions
name.ja: <ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>獄<rt>ごく</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby>メディクリウス

text.en:
2+ monsters, including a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
Gains these effects based on the number of monsters it points to.
● 1+: Once per turn: You can negate the effects of as many face-up monsters your opponent controls as possible, and if you do, halve their ATK until the end of this turn.
● 2+: Unaffected by your opponent's activated card effects.
● 3: Once per opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish both this card and all cards your opponent controls.

materials: 2+ monsters, including a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Monster
